title: SpaceX Is Building The First Gas Station In Space
description:
To build a moon colony, we need massive rockets and even more fuel. The problem? Most of that fuel is burned just escaping Earth’s atmosphere.

To solve this, SpaceX needs to do the impossible: have the spaceship dock with ANOTHER spaceship that serves as a fuel tank IN SPACE

To see what happens next, subscribe!

#space #spacex #artemis #spacecraft #moon
